message:
feat(frankenpandas): add read_sql_with_options to prelude (fd90.210 / br-qq7xq)

Same half-surface defect as fd90.207 (read_csv_with_options) and
fd90.209 (write_sql_with_options):

- read_sql is in the prelude
- SqlReadOptions is in the prelude (fd90.206)
- read_sql_with_options — the function that consumes SqlReadOptions —
  was NOT in the prelude

With this commit, the SQL read/write surface is fully reachable
from the prelude:
  read_sql / read_sql_table / read_sql_chunks / read_sql_with_options
  write_sql / write_sql_with_options
  SqlReadOptions / SqlWriteOptions / SqlInspector / SqlConnection

Verified: 35 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
